content.rendered:
Lucinda Williams has been covering Bruce’s music in her concerts for years (and teaming up with him on stage once as well), but she’s only recorded one of his songs in the studio.

On her 2016 album, The  Ghosts of Highway 20, Lucinda recorded her cover of “Factory.” Her arrangement transplants the song from New Jersey to a lonely western town, but she finds and keeps tight hold of the purpose and the price that’s at the heart of the song.

By the time she recorded the song in 2015, Lucinda had already been performing “Factory” in her concerts. If you were lucky, you might have caught one of those shows, like this one in Perth from 2013:

© December 26, 2018

excerpt.rendered: Lucinda Williams covers Bruce in concert often, but she’s only covered him in the studio once. Take a listen to her version of “Factory” from her 2016 album, The Ghost of Highway 20.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Disgusted
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: One time only: Bruce joined Lucinda Williams and her band on stage in London to perform a cover of Melvin Jackson's "Disgusted."

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, The Deep Dark Woods: Factory
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Canadian band Deep Dark Woods turns in a faithful cover of Bruce's minimalist musing on the meaning of work.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me: She Don’t Love Me Now
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: A return to form for Bruce as a cover artist and a fitting tribute for an artist we've featured here may times before.

jetpack-related-posts.title: November 10
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Not one but *two* Springsteen box sets were released on this date: Live 1975-85 and Tracks. Plus: a Billy Joel guest appearance, a Daily Show interview, and more.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Stay
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Bruce and Jackson Browne team up to cover "Stay" by The Zodiacs at the 1979 MUSE concerts. Along with the other tracks from that show, it's Bruce's first live appearance on record.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Daniele Tenca: Johnny 99
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Daniele Tenca turned in a gloriously gritty cover of "Johnny 99" at a live performance in 2018. It's now my all-time favorite arrangement of the song.
